name: Hidden Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend butter, powdered sugar and vanilla with a mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy.
2. At low speed, beat in flour and chopped pecans until well blended.
3. Divide the dough into 40 portions and shape each one around a chocolate kiss, covering it completely.
4. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 12 minutes at 375°F. The cookies do not brown.
5. Let stand for 1 minute, then remove to a rack and cool slightly.
6. Roll the cooled cookies in powdered sugar.
7. When completely cool, roll again in powdered sugar.
8. Try to distribute the dough evenly around the kiss and use just enough dough to fully hide it. Avoid overhandling so the cookies remain light and delicate.
